actions.name: Aroma Veil
actions.description: Effect: The user and allies within range have a 50% chance of being cured of 1 @Trait[minor-affliction] and a 10% chance of being cured of 1 @Trait[major-affliction] at the end of their Activations, the oldest Afflictions being cured first.

system.description: Effect: The user and allies within range have a 50% chance of being cured of 1 @Trait[minor-affliction] and a 10% chance of being cured of 1 @Trait[major-affliction] at the end of their Activations, the oldest Afflictions being cured first.
